entries.title: 修复周末岗位排班过滤
entries.author: huajune
summary: Added structured `workTimeText` parsing to schedule semantic classification.
Weekend-only jobs are now recognized from `weekWorkTime.customnWorkTimeList[].customWorkWeekdays` and `dailyShiftSchedule.combinedArrangement[].combinedArrangementWeekdays`.
Added regression coverage for structured weekend-only jobs and mixed weekday/weekend schedules.
天通苑 `周末兼职` queries can now retain the structured weekend-only jobs, including 果蔬好 `528102` and `527672` from the reproduced snapshot.
Jobs that require weekdays or full-week availability are still excluded from strict weekend-only queries.
fixes: Added structured `workTimeText` parsing to schedule semantic classification.
Weekend-only jobs are now recognized from `weekWorkTime.customnWorkTimeList[].customWorkWeekdays` and `dailyShiftSchedule.combinedArrangement[].combinedArrangementWeekdays`.
Added regression coverage for structured weekend-only jobs and mixed weekday/weekend schedules.
天通苑 `周末兼职` queries can now retain the structured weekend-only jobs, including 果蔬好 `528102` and `527672` from the reproduced snapshot.
Jobs that require weekdays or full-week availability are still excluded from strict weekend-only queries.
verification: Pre-push `pnpm run ci:check`: 236 suites passed, 2890 tests passed
